infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PerX needs access to your photos so you can upload offer and business images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: PerX can save images you choose for your offers.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PerX can use your camera to take photos for offers and your business profile.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationUsageDescription: PERX sends you perk approvals, points expiry warnings, and new perk alerts.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: PerX reads your steps and sleep from Apple Health to track wellness challenges.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: PerX does not write health data.

plugins.photosPermission: PerX needs access to your photos so you can upload offer and business images.
plugins.cameraPermission: PerX can use your camera to take photos for offers and your business profile.
